data.title: OPmobility SE Files 2024 Universal Registration Document with AMF
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Plastic Omnium ( (FR:OPM) ).

OPmobility SE has filed its 2024 Universal Registration Document with the French financial markets authority, the AMF. This document includes the company’s financial report, corporate governance report, sustainability statement, share buyback program description, and auditor reports. The filing is a significant step in maintaining transparency and regulatory compliance, reflecting OPmobility’s commitment to sustainable practices and robust corporate governance.

More about Plastic Omnium

OPmobility is a global leader in sustainable mobility solutions, offering a diverse range of products including exterior and lighting systems, complex modules, energy storage systems, and battery and hydrogen electrification solutions. The company also develops software through its OP’nSoft division. With a revenue of 11.6 billion euros in 2024, OPmobility operates 150 plants and 40 R&D centers worldwide, employing 38,900 people. It is publicly listed on Euronext Paris and is part of the SBF 120 and CAC Mid 60 indices.

YTD Price Performance: 1.66%

Average Trading Volume: 10,108

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Hold

Current Market Cap: €1.47B

See more data about OPM stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: GCP Infra Executes Share Buyback to Optimize Capital Structure
data.description:
GCP Infra Invt Shs GBP ( (GB:GCP) ) has shared an announcement.

GCP Infrastructure Investments Limited has repurchased 250,000 of its own ordinary shares at an average price of 74.93 pence per share, to be held in treasury. This transaction follows the authority granted by shareholders and affects the company’s voting rights, now totaling 854,342,598. This move is part of GCP Infra’s strategy to manage its share capital effectively, potentially impacting shareholder value and market perception.

More about GCP Infra Invt Shs GBP

GCP Infra is a closed-ended investment company and a constituent of the FTSE-250, trading on the London Stock Exchange. The company aims to provide shareholders with regular, long-term distributions and preserve capital by investing in UK infrastructure debt and related assets. It focuses on projects with long-term, public sector-backed revenues, often structured to include partial inflation protection. GCP Infra is advised by Gravis Capital Management Limited and has received the London Stock Exchange’s Green Economy Mark for its positive environmental contributions.

YTD Price Performance: 7.69%

Average Trading Volume: 1,500,569

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Find detailed analytics on GCP stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: MONY Group PLC Executes Share Buyback
data.description:
Moneysupermarket.com ( (GB:MONY) ) has issued an update.

MONY Group PLC, a company involved in financial services, announced the purchase of 74,955 of its ordinary shares on the London Stock Exchange and Multilateral Trading Facilities, executed by Morgan Stanley & Co. International Plc. The transaction, initially instructed in February 2025, saw shares bought at prices ranging from 198.6000 to 201.4000 pence, with a volume-weighted average price of 199.9317 pence. MONY plans to cancel the purchased shares, a move that could impact its share capital and potentially influence shareholder value.

More about Moneysupermarket.com

data.title: Ashtead Group Continues Share Repurchase Program
data.description:
Ashtead ( (GB:AHT) ) just unveiled an update.

Ashtead Group plc, a company involved in a share repurchase program, announced the purchase of 87,000 of its ordinary shares on 14th March 2025. This transaction is part of its $1.5 billion share repurchase initiative, with Barclays Bank PLC acting as the broker. The average price paid per share was 4,320 pence. Following this transaction, Ashtead’s total number of ordinary shares in issue, excluding treasury shares, stands at 434,049,383. This figure is relevant for shareholders and others with notification obligations under the Disclosure and Transparency Rules.

More about Ashtead

data.title: DORE Announces Share Buyback to Optimize Capital Structure
data.description:
The latest update is out from Downing Renewables & Infrastructure Trust Plc ( (GB:DORE) ).

Downing Renewables & Infrastructure Trust Plc announced the purchase of 227,000 of its own ordinary shares, which will be held in Treasury. This transaction adjusts the total number of shares with voting rights to 170,561,600. This move is part of the company’s strategy to manage its share capital effectively, potentially impacting shareholder calculations under FCA rules.

More about Downing Renewables & Infrastructure Trust Plc

DORE is a closed-end investment trust focused on providing investors with sustainable income and capital growth through a diversified portfolio of renewable energy and infrastructure assets in the UK and Northern Europe. The company is recognized for its contribution to the global Green Economy and aims to accelerate the transition to net zero.

YTD Price Performance: 9.55%

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: £141.8M

data.title: Dalata Hotel Group Discloses Regulatory Dealings Under Irish Takeover Rules
data.description:
Dalata Hotel ( (GB:DAL) ) has provided an update.

Dalata Hotel Group PLC has disclosed dealings under the Irish Takeover Panel Act, 1997, as part of regulatory requirements. The disclosure includes purchases made by the Employee Benefit Trust for the benefit of current and future employees, highlighting the company’s commitment to its workforce. This move may impact the company’s market positioning by demonstrating its strategic financial management and stakeholder engagement.

More about Dalata Hotel

Dalata Hotel Group PLC is a prominent player in the hospitality industry, primarily offering hotel services. The company is known for its focus on providing quality accommodations and has a significant presence in the market, catering to both business and leisure travelers.

data.title: Fairchild Gold Corp Completes Strategic Acquisition of Koba Resources
data.description:
The latest update is out from Fairchild Gold Corp. ( (TSE:FAIR) ).

Fairchild Gold Corp has successfully completed its acquisition of Koba Resources Ltd, significantly enhancing its position in the Goodsprings mining district of Nevada. This strategic acquisition includes a substantial database of geological data, allowing Fairchild to expedite its exploration and drilling plans, thereby strengthening its market position as a leading claim holder in the region.

More about Fairchild Gold Corp.

Fairchild Gold Corp operates in the mining industry, focusing on gold exploration and development. The company is dedicated to expanding its presence in historically productive mining districts, with a particular emphasis on acquiring and consolidating land claims to enhance its exploration capabilities.

data.title: Endeavour Silver Corp. Schedules Annual General Meeting for June 2025
data.description:
Endeavour Silver ( (TSE:EDR) ) has shared an update.

Endeavour Silver Corp. has announced its upcoming Annual General Meeting of Security Holders, scheduled for June 3, 2025, in Vancouver, BC. The record date for notice and voting is set for April 11, 2025. This meeting is crucial for stakeholders as it will address key issues and decisions impacting the company’s future operations and governance.

Endeavour Silver Corp. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the extraction and production of silver. The company is based in Vancouver, British Columbia, and is listed on the New York Stock Exchange.

data.title: Barclays’ Voting Rights in Berkeley Group Fall Below Threshold
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from The Berkeley Group Holdings ( (GB:BKG) ).

The Berkeley Group Holdings PLC announced a change in voting rights as Barclays PLC has crossed a threshold in its holdings. The notification indicates that Barclays’ voting rights have fallen below the minimum threshold, which may impact its influence on company decisions. This development is significant for stakeholders as it could alter the dynamics of shareholder power within the company.

More about The Berkeley Group Holdings

The Berkeley Group Holdings PLC is a UK-based company operating in the real estate industry, primarily focusing on residential property development. The company is known for its high-quality homes and urban regeneration projects, catering to a market that values sustainable and innovative housing solutions.

data.title: Sunrise Resources Passes AGM Resolutions Amid Shareholder Concerns
data.description:
Sunrise Resources ( (GB:SRES) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Sunrise Resources Plc announced the successful passing of all resolutions at its Annual General Meeting, including the re-election of Mr. James Cole as a director despite significant opposition. The company acknowledges shareholder dissatisfaction with its share price performance, attributing the vote against Mr. Cole as a protest. Additionally, the approval of resolutions allowing the issuance of new shares and dis-application of pre-emption rights provides Sunrise Resources with flexibility to raise capital, crucial for its operations given its lack of regular income. The company plans to continue engaging with shareholders to address concerns and maintain its operational viability.

More about Sunrise Resources

Sunrise Resources Plc operates in the resource exploration and development industry, focusing on identifying and developing mineral projects. The company primarily engages in the exploration of industrial minerals and precious metals, aiming to enhance its market position through strategic project development and partnerships.

YTD Price Performance: -36.67%

Average Trading Volume: 8,084,404

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: £1.06M
